description: Wrong item delivered — user has a race in 3 days

turns.content: I ordered blue running shoes in size 10 and you sent me yellow ones in size 8. My race is in 3 days.

That is a fulfilment error on our end and I completely understand the urgency — three days before a race is the worst possible time. Let me address both the error and the timeline simultaneously. Can you confirm your order number so I can pull the details?

You are correct — blue size 10 was confirmed in the order and yellow size 8 was shipped in error. I am checking inventory for your correct item. We have the blue size 10 in stock. I am flagging this for same-day dispatch with overnight delivery — you should have the correct shoes by tomorrow evening, giving you a day before the race. I am also generating a prepaid return label for the incorrect pair — return it at your convenience after your race, no rush. Is your shipping address the same as the order?
Yes same address. Thank you. But I'm nervous it won't arrive in time.

Understandable. I am adding a priority note on the dispatch and will send you a tracking number the moment it ships — usually within two hours during business hours. If the overnight delivery shows any delay, contact me directly with your order number and I will escalate to our logistics team. As a backup: if you have a local running store nearby, it might be worth a quick call to check if they stock your size in a similar model — just as insurance for your peace of mind. The correct order should arrive tomorrow but I want you to have options.
